artPrompt: A vertiginous overlook above a vast concrete spillway, churning green toxic water cascading down rusted channels into a bruised stormy distance, the crumbling treatment plant sprawling beyond. Mutant overgrowth claws over the railing in the foreground; sickly bioluminescence threads the foam below. No figure, only the dizzying drop and ecological menace welling up, rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Spillway Overlook
text:
Spillway Overlook enters the battlefield tapped.
When Spillway Overlook enters the battlefield, scry 1, then roll a six-sided die. On a 6, put a sludge counter on a creature you control — something rose to the surface while you were looking away.
{T}: Add {R} or {G}.
flavorText: Best view in town. Worst thing to view.
